title: Signals behind your code
description: Read change, ownership, activity, and delivery stability signals from Git history.
error: Overview analysis could not be loaded.

onboarding.title: Start with a repository
onboarding.description: Choose a local Git repository before reading GitPulse signals.
onboarding.body: GitPulse analyzes local Git history only. Select a repository to enable branch, remote, and signal controls.

workspaceDetails.title: Repository details
workspaceDetails.description: Analysis controls for the current repository.
workspaceDetails.checkingRemoteDescription: Fetching remote refs and comparing the current branch with upstream.
workspaceDetails.pullingRemoteDescription: Pulling remote changes with fast-forward only.
workspaceDetails.switchingBranchDescription: Checking out the branch and refreshing analysis.

remoteStatus.title: Remote status
remoteStatus.description: Run a remote check to see whether this branch is current.
remoteStatus.noUpstreamDescription: This branch does not have a remote tracking branch yet.
remoteStatus.dirtyDescription: Commit or stash local changes before pulling.

history.title: Analysis history
history.description: Recent analysis runs for this repository let you compare the current signal with the previous baseline.

compare.title: Snapshot compare
compare.description: Compare the latest analysis snapshot with an earlier run from the same repository.
compare.scopeChangedBranch: Branch changed between the compared snapshots.
compare.scopeChangedWindow: Analysis window changed between the compared snapshots.
compare.scopeChangedBoth: Branch and analysis window changed between the compared snapshots.

description.notChecked: Run a remote check before trusting that this analysis matches the latest upstream state.
description.up_to_date: This analysis matches {{upstream}} at the current HEAD.
description.behind: This analysis is based on a local HEAD that is {{behind}} commits behind {{upstream}}.
description.ahead: This analysis is based on local commits that are ahead of {{upstream}}.
description.diverged: This analysis is based on a local branch that has diverged from {{upstream}}.
description.no_upstream: This branch does not track a remote branch yet, so freshness cannot be verified.
description.fetch_failed: GitPulse could not verify whether this analysis matches the latest remote state.
description.dirty: Local changes are present, so refresh and pull actions may not reflect a clean branch state.
description.pull_failed: Remote updates could not be applied, so this analysis may still be stale.

export.title: Analysis report export
export.description: Download the current repository analysis as Markdown or JSON for review and sharing.
export.includesValue: Overview, hotspots, ownership, activity, delivery risk, and analysis settings.
export.formatValue: Markdown for review notes, JSON for automation or archival.
export.statusIdle: Choose a format to download the current analysis.
export.empty: Run analysis before exporting a report.
